note: Example group-to-org mapping. Point GROUP_MAP_FILE at a copy of this. JSON, not YAML: the keys below are OIDC group names from an external IdP, and YAML would coerce a group literally named `no`, `on`, `off` or `yes` into a boolean. `note` is the comment field JSON does not have.

orgs.note: Org and site roles are derived from these groups and reconciled on EVERY login. Project roles are managed in-app and must never appear here: an org role granted by hand would be silently deleted by the user's next login, so the schema makes that state unrepresentable.
